partial_progress.details: Full analysis of restricted_bounded_witness, false intermediate lemmas identified, new approach designed

summary: Analyzed restricted_bounded_witness and its sorry-laden dependencies. The intermediate lemmas restricted_single_step_forcing and restricted_succ_propagates_F_not are FALSE when FF(psi) is outside deferralClosure. Root cause: DRM negation completeness is limited to subformulaClosure. The f_step disjunction alone cannot guarantee eventual resolution. Recommended fix: modify constrained_successor_seed_restricted to force boundary resolution (include psi directly when FF(psi) not in deferralClosure). Critical proof obligation: seed consistency. 5 theorems to delete, Class A proof (lines 2343-2449) must be preserved.
